title: Docstring hygiene in benchmark_discovery
description: Add Sphinx-style docstrings for public functions in tools/benchmark_discovery.py without changing behavior.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added Sphinx-style docstrings for public helpers in tools/benchmark_discovery.py (arg parsing, cache cleanup, timing, serial/parallel benchmarks, loaders).

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Public functions in tools/benchmark_discovery.py have Sphinx-style docstrings.
